title: neyraudia reynaudiana
intro: Neyraudia reynaudiana, also known as the Himalayan sweet grass or Neyraudia grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neyraudia reynaudiana include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, among others. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various health conditions.
